summary: Allow users to reset their password via email link
description:
As a registered user who has forgotten my password, I want to request a password reset link by email so that I can regain access to my account without contacting support.

The reset link should expire after 30 minutes and be single-use. Password must meet the existing complexity policy (min 8 chars, 1 number, 1 special character).
acceptance_criteria: Given a registered email, when the user submits 'Forgot Password', then a reset link is emailed within 60 seconds.
Given an unregistered email, when the user submits 'Forgot Password', then a generic confirmation message is shown without revealing whether the account exists.
Given a valid reset link, when the user opens it within 30 minutes, then they can set a new password that meets the complexity policy.
Given a reset link older than 30 minutes, when the user opens it, then they see an 'expired link' message and can request a new one.
Given a reset link that has already been used once, when the user opens it again, then it is rejected as invalid.
Given a new password that does not meet the complexity policy, when the user submits it, then an inline validation error is shown and the password is not changed.
